subject: Trunks (youth), a young male figure with light-colored spiky hair in a teal jacket, flying forward in an action pose against a green energy background

description: A young male figure with pale, silvery-lavender spiky hair flies forward toward the viewer in a dynamic action pose. The figure wears a teal-green jacket with orange accent cuffs and has a determined, fierce expression. One fist is raised and extended toward the viewer while the other hand holds a small object near the body. The background is an explosive green energy field with light-burst effects suggesting high-speed motion or power release. The card's character field identifies this as 'Trunks: Youth / Saiyan/Earthling / Hirudegarn Saga', printed in the card frame — used only to confirm character context, not as visual evidence. The composition is a wide dynamic shot with strong forward momentum.
foreground: young male figure with pale spiky hair in teal jacket, flying fist-forward
